skill.name: theme-factory
skill.description: Apply curated color palettes and font pairings to presentations, documents, reports, and HTML artifacts. Includes ten preset visual themes and guidance for creating a custom theme when needed.
skill.summary: Apply curated visual themes to decks, documents, reports, and HTML artifacts.
skill.author: DYAI2025

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported network, external command, weak cryptography, and C2 keyword patterns. Review found these are false positives from Apache license URLs, markdown code spans, theme color hex values, and ordinary descriptive text; no executable code, command invocation, network behavior, data exfiltration, or prompt injection was found in the reviewed files.

low_findings.title: False Positive: License URLs Flagged as Network Access
low_findings.description: Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE. LICENSE.txt lines 4 and 196 contain standard Apache License reference URLs. They are plain legal text and do not instruct the assistant to make network requests or transmit data.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The lines are part of the standard Apache License text. There is no surrounding code, fetch instruction, credential handling, or operational network behavior.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Code Spans Flagged as Shell Execution
low_findings.description: Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE. SKILL.md references theme-showcase.pdf and the themes directory in markdown code spans. Theme files use markdown code spans for hex color values. These backticks are formatting, not Ruby or shell execution.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged backticks are in markdown documentation around filenames and color literals. No shell command, Ruby expression, interpolation, or execution context exists in these files.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography and C2 Keyword Matches in Plain Text
low_findings.description: Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE. The weak cryptography alerts match words in license text, theme descriptions, and hex color values. The C2 alert in themes/midnight-galaxy.md line 9 is a color value, not command-and-control behavior.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The reviewed context contains natural language and color palette data only. No cryptographic API, encoded payload, callback endpoint, persistence mechanism, or hidden instruction is present.

content.value_statement: Unstyled decks and documents often look inconsistent and take extra design time. This skill supplies ready-made theme specifications and a process for applying them consistently.
actual_capabilities: Presents ten named visual themes with color palettes and font pairings.
Guides selection of a theme before applying styles to an artifact.
Applies chosen colors and fonts consistently across slides, documents, reports, or HTML pages.
Uses theme files as specifications for palette, typography, and intended use.
Can generate a custom theme based on user input when presets do not fit.
Encourages readability checks and consistent visual identity across the artifact.
limitations: It provides design guidance, not a rendering engine or standalone application.
It depends on the host assistant to edit the target artifact format.
Preset themes use a small fixed set of color and font choices.
It does not validate brand compliance against external brand guidelines.

use_cases.title: Refresh a Client Slide Deck
use_cases.description: Apply a professional theme to make an existing presentation more consistent before delivery.

use_cases.title: Style Internal Reports
use_cases.description: Use a readable palette and font pairing for quarterly reports, briefings, and operational summaries.

use_cases.title: Create a Custom Campaign Look
use_cases.description: Generate a theme from campaign goals when none of the preset styles match the desired audience.

prompt_templates.title: Choose a Preset Theme
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the available Theme Factory themes and help me choose one for my presentation.

prompt_templates.title: Apply a Theme to a Deck
prompt_templates.scenario: Use a selected preset on an existing artifact
prompt_templates.prompt: Apply the Ocean Depths theme to this slide deck and keep the layout readable.

prompt_templates.title: Match Theme to Audience
prompt_templates.scenario: Select a theme based on business context
prompt_templates.prompt: Recommend a Theme Factory style for a healthcare strategy deck and explain the choice briefly.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Custom Theme
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a custom theme for a premium AI analytics report, then apply it consistently to the artifact.

output_examples.input: Apply Modern Minimalist to an architecture portfolio.
output_examples.output: The portfolio uses a grayscale palette, DejaVu Sans typography, clean spacing, and restrained accents for project details.

output_examples.input: Recommend a theme for a sustainability report.
output_examples.output: Forest Canopy is a strong fit because its green and earth-tone palette supports environmental reporting and wellness topics.

output_examples.input: Create a custom theme for a luxury product launch.
output_examples.output: A custom theme is proposed with refined dark neutrals, a precise accent color, and typography suited to premium product storytelling.

best_practices: Confirm the chosen theme before modifying the artifact.
Check contrast and readability after applying colors and fonts.
Use one theme consistently across the full artifact unless sections require clear separation.
anti_patterns: Do not mix several preset themes in one artifact without a clear system.
Do not apply accent colors to body text if readability suffers.
Do not create a custom theme before checking whether a preset already fits.

faq.question: What types of artifacts can this skill style?
faq.answer: It can guide styling for slides, documents, reports, and HTML landing pages handled by the host assistant.

faq.question: How many preset themes are included?
faq.answer: The skill includes ten preset themes with named palettes, font pairings, and suggested use cases.

faq.question: Can it create a new theme?
faq.answer: Yes. It can generate a custom theme from user input when the preset themes do not fit.

faq.question: Does it edit files by itself?
faq.answer: No. It provides instructions and specifications for the assistant to apply within the current tool environment.

faq.question: Does it include brand guideline validation?
faq.answer: No. Users should provide brand rules if strict compliance is required.

faq.question: Is the skill safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes. The reviewed files contain documentation, theme specifications, a license, and a showcase PDF reference with no executable behavior.
